local function D(D)return V[D-(-391785+441875)]end do local D=type local z=string.sub local J=table.insert local j=string.len local B=math.floor local d=string.char local I=V local return(function(V,J,j,B,d,I,k,s,W,O,R,C,p,t,y,E,x,l,N,M,Y,z)O,x,C,E,Y,z,M,p,t,N,R,l,y,W,s=function(V,D)local J=E(D)local j=function(j)return z(V,{j},D,J)end return j
